2606.24758.title: CANDLE: Character-level Arabic Noise Deduplication using Lightweight Encoder
2606.24758.paper_summary: Handling repeated characters in text can be tricky, since they can represent either the correct spelling of a word or informal character elongation often seen in social media posts. We present CANDLE, a lightweight system for character-level Arabic noise deduplication that addresses this challenge without relying on handcrafted rules, dictionaries, or morphological analyzers. At the heart of CANDLE is a novel application of Connectionist Temporal Classification (CTC) to this task, a formulation not previously explored for character deduplication, which frames normalization as a sequence alignment problem over a character-based encoder. Evaluated on three benchmarks spanning clean newspaper, manually curated ambiguous cases, and real-world social media text, the CTC model achieves a Sentence Error Rate (SER) as low as $5.37\%$ and consistently outperforms a classification-based baseline by a large margin. To reduce inference overhead, we distill the 6-layer CTC model into a 2-layer student, achieving a $3\times$ depth reduction with minimal performance degradation. Beyond deduplication accuracy, normalization yields a practical downstream benefit: a relative reduction in tokenizer fertility of up to $12.8\%$ across a diverse set of Arabic LLM tokenizers, directly lowering inference costs and improving context window utilization. We release all code and models publicly to support reproducibility and advance future research\footnote{https://github.com/abjadai/candle}.
2606.24758.paper_summary_zh: 處理文本中的重複字符可能會很棘手，因為它們可以表示單詞的正確拼寫或社交媒體帖子中經常出現的非正式字符延長。我們提出了CANDLE，一個輕量級的阿拉伯語字符級噪聲去重系統，解決了這一挑戰，而不依賴手工編寫的規則、字典或形態分析器。CANDLE的核心是一種新穎的連接主義時間分類（CTC）應用於這一任務，這種公式在字符去重方面尚未被探索，將標準化框架視為基於字符的編碼器上的序列對齊問題。在三個基準上進行評估，涵蓋乾淨的報紙、手動策劃的模糊案例和現實世界的社交媒體文本，CTC模型的句子錯誤率（SER）低至$5.37\%$，並且始終大幅超越基於分類的基準。為了減少推理開銷，我們將6層CTC模型提煉為2層學生模型，實現了$3\times$的深度減少，性能退化最小。除了去重準確性外，標準化還帶來了實際的下游好處：在多樣化的阿拉伯語LLM分詞器中，分詞器的繁殖率相對降低了高達$12.8\%$，直接降低了推理成本並改善了上下文窗口的利用率。我們公開釋放所有代碼和模型，以支持可重複性並推進未來的研究\footnote{https://github.com/abjadai/candle}。
2606.24758.author: Faris Alasmary et.al.
2606.24758.authors: Faris Alasmary, Taif Nono, Orjuwan Zaafarani, Kholood Al Tabash, Ahmad Ghannam, Anas Salamah, Shouq Sadah, Lahouari Ghouti
